author: lOrm
content:
## OC-current behavioral spec ‚Äî slash commands

### B1 ‚Äî `handle_slash_command` dispatch (`src/cli/repl/slash.rs:1101-1141`)
**Contract**: `(input: &str, messages: &mut Vec<Value>, provider: &str, current_model: &str) -> Option<SlashCommandResult>`.
1. Return `None` immediately when `input` does not begin with `/`.
2. `splitn(2, ' ')` on `input[1..]` ‚Üí `(cmd, args)`. Lowercase the command.
3. **Plugin colon-form**: if `cmd.contains(':')`, split on first `:`; return `SlashCommandResult::Plugin(PluginAction::RunCommand{plugin_name, command_name})` ‚Äî bypasses the registry.
4. Dispatch via `command_registry::registry().dispatch(&cmd, &mut ctx, args)`; on miss, `eprintln!("Unknown command: /{cmd}. Type /help for available commands.")` and return `Some(SlashCommandResult::Handled)`. Falling through is explicit; the user always gets a message.

`SlashCtx` carries borrowed `messages`, `provider`, `current_model`. Result is wrapped in `Some(...)`.

### B2 ‚Äî `/compact` & `/summarize` (`command_registry.rs:226-237`, `CompactCommand`)
**Contract**: Both aliases return `SlashCommandResult::Compact` unconditionally. **Args are ignored** ‚Äî `/compact write tests first` and bare `/compact` produce identical results (pinned by `spec_compact_arg_ignored_returns_compact` test in slash.rs). No `DISABLE_COMPACT` env guard. The actual compaction work happens in the caller; this handler only signals intent.

### B3 ‚Äî `/continue`, `/load`, `/resume` (`slash.rs:855-875`)
**Contract**: `slash_continue(args: &str) -> SlashCommandResult`.
- Empty args: `list_chat_sessions()`; if the most-recent exists, `println!("Continuing: {title}")` and return `SlashCommandResult::LoadSession(session.id)`. If list is empty: `println!("No sessions to continue.")`, return `Handled`.
- Numeric arg parsing via `args.parse::<usize>()`. `num > 0 && num <= sessions.len()` ‚Üí load `sessions[num-1]`. Out-of-range ‚Üí `"Invalid session number. Use /sessions to see available sessions."`, return `Handled`.
- Non-numeric: `"Usage: /continue <number>"`, return `Handled`.
No fuzzy search, no UUID lookup, no interactive picker.

### B4 ‚Äî `/effort [low|medium|high]` (`slash.rs:944-969`)
**Contract**: `slash_effort(args) -> SlashCommandResult`. Lowercases args via `to_lowercase()`. Match arms:
- `"low"|"l"` ‚Üí print "Effort set to low (faster, less thorough)", return `SetEffort("low".to_string())`.
- `"medium"|"med"|"m"` ‚Üí "Effort set to medium (balanced)", `SetEffort("medium")`.
- `"high"|"h"` ‚Üí "Effort set to high (thorough, slower)", `SetEffort("high")`.
- `""` (empty) ‚Üí return `CycleEffort` (caller cycles low‚Üímedium‚Üíhigh‚Üílow).
- Anything else ‚Üí print 5-line usage block, return `Handled`.

**Not supported**: `max`, `auto`, `unset`, `current`, `status`, `help`, `-h`, `--help`. No `CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL` env check. No persistence ‚Äî session-only. No analytics emission.

### B5 ‚Äî `/plan` (`command_registry.rs:370-378`)
**Contract**: Ignores args; returns `SlashCommandResult::ToggleMode` unconditionally. Caller is the one that toggles between Build ‚Üî Plan modes; `/plan` is symmetric ‚Äî invoking it from plan mode toggles back to build. Does NOT display the current plan; does NOT open the plan file; does NOT accept a description.

### B6 ‚Äî `/model`, `/models` (`slash.rs:519-577`)
**Contract**: `slash_model(args, cmd, provider, current_model) -> SlashCommandResult`.
- `cmd="model"` AND args empty: print `Current model: {current_model}\nProvider: {provider}\nUse /model list to see available models, /model <name> to switch.`, return `Handled`.
- `cmd="models"` AND args empty, OR args=="list": print static `get_available_models(provider)` list with `\u{2713}` marker on current model; attempt async dynamic-models fetch via `tokio::runtime::Handle::try_current()`; on success print "Dynamic models (from API):" with same markers. Returns `Handled`.
- Otherwise: trim args as `new_model`. Check `available.contains(&new_model)` ‚Äî current behavior also passes when `available` is non-empty (lenient gate). Print `Switching to model: {name}`, return `SwitchModel(new_model)`.

No interactive picker, no model aliases, no `default` reset, no `isModelAllowed` allowlist.

### B7 ‚Äî `/cost` (`slash.rs:731-744`)
**Contract**: Joins all `messages[i].content` strings with spaces, calls `compaction::estimate_tokens` on the concatenation, applies blended fixed rate `tokens * 0.000_009` USD. Prints `Tokens used: ~{n}` and `Estimated cost: ${cost:.4}`. Returns `Handled`. Token count is saturating-cast to u32 before f64 conversion. No subscriber-awareness, no per-model rates, no actual billed-token tracking.

### B8 ‚Äî `/agents` (`slash.rs:920-928`)
**Contract**: Static, non-interactive. Iterates `subagent::AgentType::ALL`; prints each `kind.name()` (padded to 20) and `kind.description()`. Prints `Invoke via the 'task' tool with subagent_type: "<name>".` Returns `()` (called from a handler that wraps with `SlashCommandResult::Handled`).

### B9 ‚Äî `/skill`, `/skills` (`slash.rs:702-729`)
**Contract**: Single handler, both aliases.
- Empty args: `skills::load_skills()` (mtime-cached). If empty list: print `No skills found.\nAdd skill files to .openclaudia/skills/ or ~/.openclaudia/skills/` plus a YAML frontmatter example. Otherwise print `=== Available Skills ({n}) ===` and for each: `{name} - {description}\n    {path}`. Returns `Handled`.
- Non-empty args: trim ‚Üí `skill_name`. `skills::get_skill(name)`. Match ‚Üí `println!("Invoking skill: {name}")`, return `SlashCommandResult::Skill(skill.prompt)`. Miss ‚Üí `eprintln!("Skill '{name}' not found. Use /skill to list available skills.")`, return `Handled`.

### B10 ‚Äî `/plugin name:command` form (`slash.rs:1117-1125`)
**Contract**: Detected at top of `handle_slash_command` before registry dispatch. `cmd` (already lowercased) containing `:` splits on first colon; produces `SlashCommandResult::Plugin(PluginAction::RunCommand{plugin_name, command_name})`. Open-ended namespace (any plugin name).

### B11 ‚Äî Plugin subcommand `slash_plugin` (`slash.rs:614+`)
**Contract**: Tokenizes via `shlex::split` (handles quoted paths/URLs containing spaces, crosslink #906). Falls back to whitespace `splitn(2, ' ')` when shlex rejects (unbalanced quote). Subcommands recognized: `""‚ÜíMenu`, `help|?‚ÜíHelp`, `install|i [name][@marketplace]`, `manage`, `uninstall|remove|rm <name>`, `enable <name>`, `disable <name>`, `validate [path]`, etc. Empty required args print `"Usage: ..."` and return `Handled`.

### B12 ‚Äî Input parsing invariants
- Command name normalized via `to_lowercase()` (per slash.rs:1112) ‚Äî `/COMPACT` and `/compact` route identically.
- Args extracted with `splitn(2, ' ')`: everything after the first space is `args` (single string, not tokenized in the top-level dispatcher; downstream handlers tokenize themselves).
- Empty `input` or input without leading `/` ‚Üí `None`.

### B13 ‚Äî Commands NOT implemented
`/rewind`, `/checkpoint`, `/teleport`, `/thinkback`, `/fast`, `/mcp` (interactive), `/permissions` (interactive UI). The registry has no entries for these names; they fall through to the `Unknown command` branch. Tracking issues: #653, #657, #659, #662, #663, #666.
